evals.prompt:
帮我根据以下 commit 记录生成一份中文的发版说明：
feat(auth): 新增企业微信登录
fix(db): 修复并发导致的数据死锁
chore: 更新 README.md
BREAKING CHANGE: 移除 v1 版本的 API 接口
evals.expected_output: A Chinese release notes document. It must include '💥 破坏性变更' (for the API removal), '✨ 新特性' (for enterprise WeChat login), and '🐛 问题修复' (for the DB deadlock). The 'chore' commit should be ignored.

evals.prompt: Generate a changelog for this compare URL: https://github.com/vuejs/core/compare/v3.4.0...v3.4.1
evals.expected_output: An English release notes document that dynamically fetches commits from the provided GitHub compare URL. It should categorize them into Features and Bug Fixes.
